title: Section 48A
content: 1[48A. Laying of rules and regulations before State Legislature. ----2 *** and every regulation made under section 48 shall be laid, as soon as may be after it is made, before the State Legislature.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 4 of 1986, s. 2 and Schedule (w.e.f. 15-5-1986). 2. The words "Every rule made under section 47 and" omitted by Act 39 of 2000, s. 36 (w.e.f. 5-9-2000).
